content: We can reframe adaptive AI agent workflows as dynamic curiosity-driven exploration spaces, where an embedded 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism replaces static task branching logic to automatically adjust the workflow path when the pre-planned sequence hits unanticipated unknowns. The ICM assigns intrinsic reward for exploring uncharted task branches that move the agent closer to the overall goal, rather than requiring hard-coded conditional rules for every possible edge case.
